chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C. P No. D- 35 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present: Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi Mr. Justice Arbab Ali Hakro 21.01.2025 Mr. Aijaz Ali Siyal Advocate for the Petitioner. O R D E R ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner seeks direction to the Respondents to constitute Super Medical Board for examination of the Petitioner / Injured. Record reflects that injured was referred to the Medical Board where he was examined and a final opinion of the Medical Board was issued. The Petitioner’s Counsel when confronted as to how this Petition is maintainable in view of the Order dated 16th May 2006 wherein Special Medical Board was abolished w.e.f 1st June 2006, he is unable to satisfy the Court. While perusal of said Order, it reflects that the Health Department, Government of Sindh has abolished the Super Medical Board w.e.f. 1st June 2006. Under these circumstances, no case for indulgence is made out. Result thereof, this Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed along with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
